description.value:
The standard weapon of the Necron Legions, the Gauss Flayer is a terrifying device that strips targets apart molecule by molecule. It is powered by internal energy sources and never needs reloading.

Special Qualities

Gauss: If the weapon would not normally deal damage due to Armour or Toughness, it still deals 1 point of damage. Additionally, it has a high chance of causing critical damage to vehicles.
description.summary: Standard Necron weapon that strips targets molecule by molecule. Dealing energy damage with high penetration.
